creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
Hi, I updated bmd to 3.0. The plugin interfaces have been changed since this version.
So I also updated all the plugins. See the release notes in the following URLs.

* https://github.com/yuichiro-naito/bmd/releases/tag/3.0
* https://github.com/yuichiro-naito/bmd-plugin-avahi/releases/tag/3.0
* https://github.com/yuichiro-naito/bmd-plugin-hookcmd/releases/tag/3.0

I made 3 patches for upgrading sysutils/{bmd|bmd-plugin-avahi|bmd-plugin-hookcmd}.
Please apply these 3 patches in the following order.

1. bmd-3.0.patch
2. bmd-plugin-avahi-3.0.patch
3. bmd-plugin-hookcmd-3.0.patch
